description: Style NoteLet only transform your everyday life from grey and monotonous to fun, colourful and creatively eventful! We're super excited in the myntra office to be selling these yummy tops and dresses from the quirky, flirty, denim brand ONLY. It's easy to look both cute and on-trend when you're wearing anything from this summery collection.Product DetailsWhite with blue polka dot top, V-neck with tie option, smocked shoulder panels, three fourth sleeve with buttoned cuffs, smocked elastic band at the hemMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coolDo not bleach or tumble dryCool ironSize and FitLoose fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
